done_criteria: Tracker health is repaired or degraded-mode fallback is explicit and tested.

Skill-owned closeout is exercised end to end for validation, post-mortem, and handoff.
Codex artifact/prompt maintenance drift is easier to repair and harder to reintroduce.

ranked_packet.summary: Repair beads health so normal planning and closeout can query issue state again.
Add a real executable proof for the Codex no-beads RPI path.
Exercise validation, post-mortem, and handoff closeout ownership with repeated stop coverage.
Refactor repeated Codex lifecycle guard snippets into one reusable primitive.
Make override prompt sync and generated-hash refresh part of one obvious maintenance flow.
Stop headless validation from depending on the user's real ~/.codex state.
Capture the new Codex lifecycle learnings so future discovery is not operating cold.
